mapper.select: SELECT position_code FROM member_position WHERE member_id=#{memberId} ORDER BY priority_no
mapper.sql: SELECT m.*,COUNT(mp.match_player_id)::int match_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)::int win_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn)::int loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) inhouse_win_rate FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id
mapper.select: WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY m.real_name
WHERE m.active_yn=true AND m.member_id IN #{id} GROUP BY m.member_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE LOWER(game_name)=LOWER(#{gameName}) AND LOWER(tag_line)=LOWER(#{tagLine}) AND active_yn=true AND member_id!=#{excludeId}

SELECT m.real_name,m.game_name,m.tag_line,COUNT(*) match_count,COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn) win_count,ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/COUNT(*),1) win_rate FROM member m JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id HAVING COUNT(*)>=3 ORDER BY win_rate DESC,match_count DESC LIMIT 3
